name: Frosted Ginger-Chutney Mini-Carrot Cakes
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon ground ginger and ground allspice
recipeInstructions:
CREAM CHEESE FROSTING
1 package cream cheese (8 ounces), softened
4 cups powdered sugar
1 1/2 tablespoons milk
1. In a large bowl, combine dry ingredients; mix in oil, eggs, and remaining ingredients, except frosting.
2. Spoon batter into cups of a mini-muffin tin, filling cups about 1/2 full.
3. Bake in a preheated 350-degree oven until a toothpick inserted in the cakes comes out clean, about 15 minutes. Remove cakes from pans and cool on wire racks.
4. Frost with cream cheese frosting.
Cream Cheese Frosting:
1. Beat cream cheese in a medium bowl until fluffy.
2. Beat in powdered sugar and enough milk to make frosting a spreadable consistency.
